title: SkyQoL
description: A Hypixel Skyblock modpack that improves your quality of life by adding a lot of useful features!
body:
![el cubo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c78b012f1bec65e27d589172afbfbc65ec5295cd_0.webp)

# Release 1.0
This modpack contains a lot of QoL features from different mods such as:

- Dungeons Solver
- GUI Elements
- Chat features
- Slayer Helper
- Profile Viewer
- Item and Armor customisation
- Health and Status Bars
- Crimson Isles features
- Foraging Features
- Kuudra Features
- Garden Features

And SOOO much more it wouldn't even fit!
This modpack is everything you need for your Hypixel Skyblock Experience.

-> The modpack is not fully configured, but the essential is. Prebuilt config are bad because you basically need to fix everything by yourself : GUI Placements, mods to toggle on/off, ...
